hero.title: {Juanjo}
hero.subtitle: Building robust, secure, and scalable software
hero.description: Software Engineering student with backend development experience. Interested in software architecture, security, and quality, seeking to build robust and efficient systems.

about.title: About Me
about.description1: I am a Software Engineering student specialized in creating robust and secure applications. My focus is on software architecture, backend development with Java, and implementing QA practices to ensure code quality. My main skills are in backend, but I am always willing to learn new front-end technologies.
about.description2: My goal is to become a software architect, with a strong emphasis on cybersecurity and development best practices.
about.description3: I'm passionate about music and enjoy playing the guitar in my free time. I also love reading, always looking to learn something new or get lost in a good story. Technology and software development are my path, but hey, it's not all about code!

scheduler.title: School Schedule Generator
scheduler.description: Automated system for generating conflict-free school schedules using advanced algorithms and AI.

pos.title: Supermarket POS System
pos.description: Complete application for sales management, inventory, and billing with detailed reports.
